headline: Axon Enterprise (AXON) Following Its Public Safety Platform Narrative Looks Fully Valued
summary: Axon Enterprise (AXON) is back in the spotlight after reports that President Donald Trump bought up to US$5 million of the stock shortly before Immigration and Customs Enforcement pursued a five year contract aligned with Axon’s products. See our latest analysis for Axon Enterprise. Axon Enterprise’s recent contract speculation and record quarterly revenue have been met with sharp share price momentum, with a 30 day share price return of 31.75% and a three year total shareholder return of...
